LineHeights Tokens

Name Value CSS Variable Calculated Value
sm.line.height 1.25 --gw-sm-line-height 1.25
lg.line.height 1.6 --gw-lg-line-height 1.6
xs.line.height 1.2 --gw-xs-line-height 1.2
xxs.line.height 1 --gw-xxs-line-height 1
base.line.height 1.4 --gw-base-line-height 1.4
rem1.line.height 1rem --gw-rem1-line-height 1rem
auto.line.height 100% --gw-auto-line-height 100%
button.label.line.height {xs.line.height} --gw-button-label-line-height 1.2
floatlabel.figma.active.line.height {floatlabel.active.font.size} --gw-floatlabel-figma-active-line-height 0.75rem
badge.sm.line.height {rem1.line.height} --gw-badge-sm-line-height 1rem
message.text.line.height {auto.line.height} --gw-message-text-line-height 100%
iftalabel.figma.line.height {iftalabel.font.size} --gw-iftalabel-figma-line-height 0.75rem

Number Tokens

Name Value CSS Variable Calculated Value
image.toolbar.blur 0.5rem --gw-image-toolbar-blur 0.5rem
toast.blur 1.5rem --gw-toast-blur 1.5rem
